title: Alfalah Investments AI Contact Centre
summary: Full architectural and implementation context for the Alfalah GPT project. A production-grade AI customer support chatbot for Alfalah Investments (mutual fund AMC in Pakistan). Built with FastAPI, OpenAI GPT-4o-mini fine-tuning, RAG (ChromaDB), AWS ECS Fargate, CodeDeploy Blue/Green, GitHub Actions OIDC, and Langfuse observability. Project lives at /home/saad/Documents/Code/Devops/Project/
